title: orcuttia pilosa
intro: Orcuttia pilosa, also known as Orcutt grass or hairy Orcutt grass, is a perennial plant species in the family Poaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Orcuttia pilosa is traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems and skin irritations, due to its health benefits of relieving coughs and soothing skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil for use in traditional medicine, with some preparations also involving the use of dried roots and leaves.
